---
title: "Binomial Distribution in Epidemiology"
id: "binomial-demo-se01-sec01-sp01"
section_id: "binomial-demo-se01-sec01"
session_id: "binomial-demo-se01"
toc: false
---









## Concept

_Add a clear explanation of the key idea, concept, or definition here._

## Example

_Provide an example to illustrate the concept._

## Why it matters

_Explain the importance or practical application of this concept._

---



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-important}
**Key Emphasis**

<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add framing for this comparison or multi-perspective view here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Perspective A
<!-- editable:start tab_1_content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add content for the first perspective or approach here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

## Perspective B
<!-- editable:start tab_2_content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add content for the second perspective or approach here._]
<!-- editable:end -->


:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a prompt for the learner to compare these views or decide which applies to their context._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Prepare the learner for this answer reveal sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reveal-sequence data-variant="answer_reveal"}
**Revealed Insight**

<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the content to be revealed._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a follow-up or reflection prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction or instructions for viewing this video._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.video}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Embed the video link or iframe here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

---

## Guided Video Analysis

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-3 specific points for the learner to focus on while watching._]

- Observation 1
- Observation 2

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection and follow-up**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief reflection question or next-step instruction after viewing._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add any concluding remarks or transitions here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add framing for this R example._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.code-example}
**Code in Action**

```r
<!-- editable:start code -->
# Add your code here
<!-- editable:end -->
```

**Interpretation:**
<!-- editable:start interpretation -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Explain what this code does._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a follow-up prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this interpretation task (e.g. 'Look closely at the figure below')._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.interpretation}
**Critical Interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Prompt the learner to interpret a specific figure, table, or output._]

**What to consider:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add guidance or key things that should have been noticed._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Understanding the Binomial Distribution</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
